id: in the first half of the year
meaning: during January to June — the first six months of the year
chineseMeaning: 在今年上半年；在年度前半段（1–6月）
pronunciation: /ɪn ðə fɜːrst hɑːf əv ðə jɪər/
anchorSentence: We completed the infrastructure upgrade in the first half of the year.
collocations: in the second half of the year
in the early part of the year
notes: Counterpart to in the second half of the year. H1 = first half (Jan–Jun), H2 = second half (Jul–Dec). Always requires the definite article.
recallQuestions: 用 in the first half of the year 造一句关于已完成事项的句子。
in the first half of the year 和 in the second half of the year 连起来，描述一个全年计划。
